targets.rawSql: SELECT time, 'bouncer' AS metric, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='cs_lapi_bouncer_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='cs_lapi_bouncer_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, 'bans' AS metric, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='cs_active_decisions' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='cs_active_decisions' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, 'buckets' AS metric, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='cs_buckets' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='cs_buckets' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, 'parsed' AS metric, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='cs_parser_hits_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='cs_parser_hits_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, 'ok' AS metric, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='cs_parser_hits_ok_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='cs_parser_hits_ok_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, 'ko' AS metric, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='cs_parser_hits_ko_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='cs_parser_hits_ko_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT time, lbl AS metric, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, lbl, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS lbl, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='cs_bucket_poured_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='cs_bucket_poured_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, lbl)) GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

SELECT time, lbl AS metric, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, lbl, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS lbl, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='cs_bucket_overflowed_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='cs_bucket_overflowed_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, lbl)) GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

SELECT time, lbl AS metric, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, lbl, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'bouncer') AS lbl, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='cs_lapi_bouncer_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='cs_lapi_bouncer_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, lbl)) GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

SELECT time, lbl AS metric, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, lbl, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'route') AS lbl, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='cs_lapi_route_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='cs_lapi_route_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, lbl)) GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time
